zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth von ORTENBURG於大約1234年出生在瑞士時，她的父親Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern19歲，母親Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern15歲。她和Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans至少有6個兒子。她去世於1305年享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth von ORTENBURG于大约1234年出生在瑞士时，她的父亲Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern19岁，母亲Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern15岁。她和Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans至少有6个儿子。她去世于1305年享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ivo  , derived from the oblique case of the name.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth von ORTENBURG was born about 1234, in Switzerland, her father, Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern, was 19 and her mother, Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern, was 15. She had at least 6 sons with Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans. She died in 1305, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth von ORTENBURG est née environ 1234, à Suisse, son père, Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans. Elle est décédée en 1305, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth von ORTENBURG um 1234 in Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern 19 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern 15. Sie hatte mit Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1305 im Alter von 72 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth von ORTENBURG è nata il circa 1234 nel Svizzera, sua padre, Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans. Morì nel 1305, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von ORTENBURGが約1234年にスイスで生まれた時，父Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayernは19歳，母Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollernは15歳であった。彼女はHartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargansとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1305年に72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth von ORTENBURG(이)가 대략 1234년 스위스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth von ORTENBURG nasceu aproximadamente 1234, em Suiça, seu pai, Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans. Ela faleceu em 1305, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth von ORTENBURG родилась около 1234 г. в местности Швейцария, её отцу по имени Rapoto III von Ortenburg Pfalzgraf von Bayern было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Nürnberg Hohenzollern, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans. Она умерла в 1305 г. в возрасте 72 лет.
